name: search-consumption-cli
description: > Find and discover Microsoft Fabric items across workspaces when the workspace is unknown. Use when the user wants to: (1) find an item by name across workspaces, (2) list items of specific type across workspaces, (3) identify which workspace contains an item, (4) return item/workspace IDs for downstream API calls. Triggers: "which workspace has", "where is", "what items do I have", "do I have", "find item", "find all items", "search for item", "discover items", "find across workspaces".
author: microsoft
